description: A new customer has placed their first order. An account manager needs to set up their full account profile.

nodes.task_description: Create a new customer account record in the CRM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the main account record.

nodes.task_description: Enter all required information, including billing address, shipping addresses, and primary contact details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent populates all the necessary fields in the CRM.

nodes.task_description: Set the customer's payment terms and credit limit as approved by finance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the financial details for the new account.
